details: Which mobile networks function in Kashmir?All major networks like BSNL, Airtel, Aircel, Idea, and Jio are functional in Kashmir. However, it is essential to note that only postpaid connections work here in the majority of the areas.

details: When is the best time for the Kashmiri Apples?September is the month when apples are ripe, and you can easily find red apples en route to Gulmarg. Also, it’s worth visiting the beautiful apple orchards nearby Tangmarg for delicacy and nature-friendly clicks.

package_name: When is the best time for the Kashmiri Apples?
details: How many Lakes are there in Kashmir?Kashmir is widely known for its good numbers of beautiful fresh water and high-altitude lakes. Some of them which are always on the watchlist of travelers are Dal Lake, Nagin Lake, Krishnasar Lake Mansar Lake, Sruinsar Lake, Wular Lake, Manasbal Lake, Pangong Lake, Gangabal Lake, Tso Moriri Lake, Tso Kar Lake, etc.

package_name: How many Lakes are there in Kashmir?
details: How many Lakes are there in Kashmir?

package_name: Is it safe to travel to Kashmir?
details: Is there any wild life sanctuary in or around Srinagar area?Yes, there sure is. Dachigam wild Life Sanctuary is situated at a distance of 22 km from Srinagar, and you can visit this place at ease during your visit.

package_name: Is there any wild life sanctuary in or around Srinagar area?
details: What is Shikhara ride I've been listening about so much?Shikarar Ride is basically the traditional boat that has been designed artistically and they sail on Dal Lake in the Srinagar area. It’s a must-have experience for anyone who loves to float and explore the view of mountains from a Lake’s perspective.
